message:
test(bd-19vz): add unit tests for stdio send_response_direct, trait send, and CRLF handling

Cover send_response_direct success and cancellation, Transport::send
trait method with response and cancellation, two-phase permit
send_response, and CRLF line ending handling in recv.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
